title: Blockus
body:
Blockus is a mod made using Fabric API. It adds blocks of several types.

 

Most of the blocks require a stonecutter to make them. I recommend the use of a mod like Roughly Enough Items (REI) for all recipes.

NeoForge support is currently not planned. You can use Sinytra Connector for NeoForge support.

 

Some added blocks :

  • Marble, Limestone, Bluestone & Viridite
  • White Oak, Raw Bamboo & Charred Planks
  • Large Flower Pots
  • Lava, Magma, Water, Blaze, Soaked Bricks & more
  • Soul Sandstone
  • Teal & Charred Nether Bricks
  • Colored Tiles
  • Stained Stone Bricks
  • Colored Redstone Lamps
  • Beveled Glass
  • Patterned Wools
  • Futurneo Blocks
  • Asphalt that makes you go fast
  • Redstone Sand
  • Paper Block, Wall and Lamp
  • Hedges
  • Rainbow Blocks
  • Food Crates
  • Legacy Blocks
  • Columns integration (< 1.19)

Naturally generated things

  • Limestone is generated between y = 0 & y = 128 but much less between y = 64 & y = 128
  • Marble is generated between y = 0 & y = 64
  • Bluestone is generated below y = 0
  • Viridite is generated below y = -16 & more frequently in Deep Dark.
  • White Oak Trees are generated in Forest, Dark Forest, Flower Forest & Plains.
  • Rainbow Roses spawn in Flower Forests & Meadows

Thanks to :

  • Futurenp: Textures
  • SynthRose: Teal Nether Bricks and Lantern Blocks (with old texture)
  • shedaniel/TelepathicGrunt: new 1.16.2+ worldgen
  • YanisBft: Wooden Barrels fix

Mods inspirations:

  • "Quark" by Vazkii
  • "Chisel" by tterrag1098, Drullkus & Minecreatr
  • "Ceramics" by KnightMiner (Rainbow Bricks)

 

French description/Description française : https://www.minecraft-france.fr/mod-blockus/
